published_prior_art.cite: Russell2021/OberReynolds2023: routine relaxation-validity layer behind sharp joint-potential-outcome bounds and OT endpoint formulations

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_dose_response_iv/v1 asks for one full-data coupling, but does not define a DTE equality-expanded cycle certificate

published_prior_art.cite: GaoGeQian2025 exact global MOT and TanBlanchetSyrgkanis2026 separable CCOT are close but do not give this DTE slack-expanded pasting iff
FirpoRidder2019: already proves pointwise Makarov bounds are not uniformly sharp for finite DTE vectors/functionals; this adds rank-tube/IV pasting

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The certificate is not a well-defined function of P,D: A_v(P) depends on an unspecified optimizer when the lifted LP has multiple optimizers, and max over an empty Q_D is used before the empty-set value is defined.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The three-cell witness algebra fails as written: with r1=3/5, r2=3/5, r3=1/2 and s12=s23=s31=0, the equations r2-r3+s23=0 and r3-r1+s31=1/10 are false.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Define A_v(P) using the exposed optimal face, or quantify over all optimizers, and explicitly set C_P(D)=0 when Q_D is empty.
Replace Corollary witness with a concrete nondegenerate table whose listed local constraints, slack statuses, and cycle imbalance are all algebraically consistent.

Fix Kellerer1984 bibliographic metadata: the verified 'Duality theorems for marginal problems' source is Zeitschrift fuer Wahrscheinlichkeitstheorie und Verwandte Gebiete 67(4), 399-432, not the LNM chapter currently listed.

recommended_next_step: Redraft the certificate definition and the three-cell witness before another novelty pass; the idea is plausibly flagship, but the current load-bearing sanity reduction is wrong.
